panels.description: One bar per build version present in the cluster. Bar max is the total number of scrape targets, so the bar for the new version fills completely when the upgrade is done.
panels.title: Hosts per Build Version

panels.description: Build version of each SCM. Use this to see which instances still need to be upgraded.
panels.title: SCM Versions

panels.description: Total number of SCM instances running each build version over time.
panels.title: SCM Instances Per Version

panels.description: Build version of each Recon. Use this to see which instances still need to be upgraded.
panels.title: Recon Versions

panels.description: Total number of Recon instances running each build version over time.
panels.title: Recon Instances Per Version

panels.description: Build version of each Datanode. Use this to see which instances still need to be upgraded.
panels.title: Datanode Versions

panels.description: Total number of Datanode instances running each build version over time.
panels.title: Datanode Instances Per Version

panels.description: Build version of each Ozone Manager. Use this to see which instances still need to be upgraded.
panels.title: Ozone Manager Versions

panels.description: Total number of OM instances running each build version over time.
panels.title: Ozone Manager Instances Per Version

panels.description: Build version of each S3 Gateway. Use this to see which instances still need to be upgraded.
panels.title: S3 Gateway Versions

panels.description: Total number of S3 Gateway instances running each build version over time.
panels.title: S3 Gateway Instances Per Version
Build Version — per host over time

panels.description: Each selected host's build version over time. Each (host, version) is a row; a row is filled only while that host runs that version, so a rolling upgrade shows up as one row ending and another beginning.
panels.title: Build Version per host over time

panels.description: How many non-S3G hosts have finalized (software_version == apparent_version). Bar max is the total number of non-S3G scrape targets, so the bar fills completely when finalization is done.
panels.title: Finalized Hosts

panels.description: isFinalized per OzoneManager host. true when software_version == apparent_version.
panels.title: OzoneManager — finalization status

panels.description: Number of finalized OzoneManager hosts over time, with a dashed reference line at the total OzoneManager host count.

targets.expr: count((component_version_manager_metrics_software_version == bool component_version_manager_metrics_apparent_version) * on(instance) group_left(component) ozone_build_info{component="om"} == 1) or vector(0)

panels.title: OzoneManager — finalized vs total

panels.description: isFinalized per SCM host. true when software_version == apparent_version.
panels.title: SCM — finalization status

panels.description: Number of finalized SCM hosts over time, with a dashed reference line at the total SCM host count.

targets.expr: count((component_version_manager_metrics_software_version == bool component_version_manager_metrics_apparent_version) * on(instance) group_left(component) ozone_build_info{component="scm"} == 1) or vector(0)

panels.title: SCM — finalized vs total

panels.description: isFinalized per Datanode host. true when software_version == apparent_version.
panels.title: Datanode — finalization status

panels.description: Number of finalized Datanode hosts over time, with a dashed reference line at the total Datanode host count.

targets.expr: count((component_version_manager_metrics_software_version == bool component_version_manager_metrics_apparent_version) * on(instance) group_left(component) ozone_build_info{component="datanode"} == 1) or vector(0)

panels.title: Datanode — finalized vs total

panels.description: Software and apparent versions for selected non-S3G hosts over time. When the two lines diverge for a host, that host is pre-finalized.
panels.title: Software & Apparent Version per selected host

panels.description: isFinalized (software_version == apparent_version) for selected non-S3G hosts over time.
panels.title: isFinalized per selected host over time
